entries.title: In The Navy
entries.description: A recollection of a unique although small chapter of my life when I undertook my National Service training in the Royal Australian Navy.

entries.title: The Army Years - Part 3 - Singapore
entries.description: Amidst the mid-century Commonwealth military presence, an officer's family navigates the detailed preparations for their two-year posting to Singapore, including extensive packing.

entries.title: Three Days in Berlin - Part 1
entries.description: This account traces a twentieth-century life profoundly shaped by Nazism, global conflict, and the enduring division centered on the city of Berlin.
